meaning: n.色姆(国会)(波兰的国家立法机构)
examples: His support is volatile, but he may squeak past the 5% threshold to enter the Sejm (parliament).
Polish voters elect a two house parliament (National Assembly, Polish Zgromadzenie Narodowe), consisting of a 460 member lower house Sejm and a 100 member Senate (Senat).
If this fails, the Sejm has two weeks to find a prime minister of its own.
Mr Komorowski is also speaker of the Sejm, the lower house of the Polish parliament.
